body:
Fixes #423.

## Summary
- Adds a deterministic `installation_conversion` handler for README.md install/deploy guides, Bash/sh scripts, and PowerShell scripts.
- Converts through a shared ordered install-step IR so commands are preserved verbatim and can render to multiple target surfaces.
- Mirrors the handler and dispatch precedence in `src/web/formal_ai_worker.js` so browser-worker fallback behaves like the Rust solver.
- Adds a case study and raw research bundle under `docs/case-studies/issue-423/`, including the GitHub top-50 repository snapshot used for the test corpus.

## Reproduction and coverage
- README guide -> Bash + PowerShell scripts.
- Shell installation script -> README.md guide.
- Wrapped markdown README content containing nested shell fences.
- Unwrapped README content containing shell fences.
- 50 popular GitHub repository conversion prompts from the captured top-starred repository snapshot.

Case study: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-423-85026fdc955a/docs/case-studies/issue-423/README.md
Research appendix: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-423-85026fdc955a/docs/case-studies/issue-423/raw-data/online-research.md

## Verification
- `node --check src/web/formal_ai_worker.js`
- `node experiments/issue-423-js-installation-conversion.mjs`
- `cargo fmt -- --check`
- `cargo test --test unit installation_conversion -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test --test unit`
- `cargo test --test source`
- `cargo test --test integration`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (passes; reports only existing warning-band files, no hard violations)
